headline: Fermi America Sinks 11.5% with $375 Million Offering
summary: A $375 million convertible note offering sent Fermi America into a sharp Friday selloff, but the real question hanging over the pre-revenue power developer is whether it can land a binding tenant before its cash runway runs out.

raw.headline: Fermi America Sinks 11.5% with $375 Million Offering
raw.summary: A $375 million convertible note offering sent Fermi America into a sharp Friday selloff, but the real question hanging over the pre-revenue power developer is whether it can land a binding tenant before its cash runway runs out.

headline: GE Vernova (GEV) Is Sold Out On Turbines Through 2030 As Power Demand Builds
summary: Major electricity shortage forecasts in the US are driving unprecedented demand for GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) turbines. The company reports turbine supply effectively sold out through 2030, with its equipment highlighted as central to closing the projected power gap. GE Vernova has been singled out as an industry standout by Jim Cramer and several leading analysts amid a surge in data center and AI-related power needs. GE Vernova operates across gas power, grid solutions, and renewables,...

headline: Nuclear Operators Outpace Uranium Miners as Earnings Divergence Defines Sector
